title: Test that the GLM API connection is working correctly with
job:
Test that the GLM API connection is working correctly with the updated configuration.

Tasks:
1. Read the environment variables passed to the container to verify LLM_PROVIDER, LLM_MODEL, and OPENAI_BASE_URL are set correctly
2. Attempt a simple API call to verify the GLM endpoint is accessible
3. Create a brief test file at `logs/glm-connection-test.md` documenting:
   - What environment variables are set (masking sensitive values)
   - Whether the API connection test succeeded
   - Any errors encountered

Context: User is configuring z.ai GLM Coding Plan with:
- LLM_PROVIDER=custom
- LLM_MODEL=glm-5
- OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4
- API key via AGENT_CUSTOM_API_KEY secret

This is a verification test to confirm the setup is working.
